def solve(nums, k)
    total_sum = nums.sum
    prefix_sum = 0
    dp_prev = 0
    max_map = {0 => 0}
    nums.each do |num|
        prefix_sum += num
        remainder = prefix_sum % k
        current_candidate = -Float::INFINITY
        if max_map.key?(remainder)
            current_candidate = max_map[remainder] + prefix_sum
        end
        new_dp = [dp_prev, current_candidate].max
        current_value = new_dp - prefix_sum
        if max_map.key?(remainder)
            if current_value > max_map[remainder]
                max_map[remainder] = current_value
            end
        else
            max_map[remainder] = current_value
        end
        dp_prev = new_dp
    end
    total_sum - dp_prev
end

def solve(nums, k)
    total_sum = nums.sum
    prefix_sum = 0
    dp_prev = 0
    max_map = {0 => 0}
    nums.each do |num|
        prefix_sum += num
        remainder = prefix_sum % k
        current_candidate = -Float::INFINITY
        if max_map.include?(remainder)
            current_candidate = max_map[remainder] + prefix_sum
        end
        new_dp = [dp_prev, current_candidate].max
        current_value = new_dp - prefix_sum
        if max_map.include?(remainder)
            if current_value > max_map[remainder]
                max_map[remainder] = current_value
            end
        else
            max_map[remainder] = current_value
        end
        dp_prev = new_dp
    end
    total_sum - dp_prev
end

        else

        end
        dp_prev = new_dp
    end
    total_sum - dp_prev
